SmokeLog.title: SmokeLog
SmokeLog.description: A record of a smoking action or a purchase of cigarettes.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this log.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the action in milliseconds.

cost.description: The cost associated with the action (0 for smoke, >0 for purchase).

tag.description: An optional tag or note for the log.

UserSettings.title: UserSettings
UserSettings.description: User preferences and settings for the app.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns these settings.

traditionalCostPerPack.description: Cost per pack of traditional cigarettes.

traditionalSticksPerPack.description: Number of sticks per pack of traditional cigarettes.

electronicCostPerPack.description: Cost per pack of electronic cigarettes.

electronicSticksPerPack.description: Number of sticks per pack of electronic cigarettes.

/users/{userId}/logs/{logId}.description: Stores individual smoke and purchase logs for a user.
